column1: Complaint_Text
The exam marks for semester 5 have not been updated on the portal yet
Hostel wifi is not working since last night urgently need it fixed for online classes
Library computers are very slow and some of them are broken please fix them soon
Fees payment receipt is not being generated after successful payment
The professor is not completing the syllabus on time and we have exams soon
Room maintenance request has been pending for over a month the ceiling fan is broken
Projector in classroom 301 is not working since last week it is affecting our lectures
Scholarship documents were submitted but no acknowledgment received from the office
The assignment submission portal is down and the deadline is tomorrow this is urgent
Mess food quality has been very poor lately and students are facing health issues
Lab equipment in the chemistry lab is outdated and not working properly
ID card has not been issued even after 2 months of joining the college
Faculty attendance is not being marked properly in the system
Internet network in the hostel is extremely slow need immediate attention
The classroom AC in block B is not functioning creating discomfort during lectures
Admission documents are stuck in verification for over 3 weeks please resolve this
Professor has not returned the corrected test papers for the past month
Warden is not addressing the roommate conflict issue despite multiple complaints
Library books on the required reading list are always unavailable
Billing issue with canteen smart card amount was deducted but transaction failed
The grade for the internal assessment is incorrect please review urgently
Hostel room has water leakage problem it is a serious issue especially during rain
Computer lab does not have enough systems for all students during practical sessions
Certificate of enrollment has not been issued after repeated requests to the office
Lecture notes are not being uploaded to the learning portal by the faculty
Accommodation allocation was changed without prior notice or explanation
Building maintenance is required in block C as several lights are not working
Registration for next semester electives has not been processed despite submission
The course material provided is outdated and does not match the current curriculum
Mess timing has been changed suddenly without any announcement to the students
